changes.value:
quick-capture.tsx:198

The popup has `overflow-hidden` on the container. When the user types multiple lines, the CM6 editor scrolls internally instead of growing the popup. The user explicitly flagged this as unacceptable UI.

Suggestion: Remove fixed height constraint, let the editor grow vertically (up to a max), and resize the Tauri window to match content height.
Quick capture popup should auto-grow instead of scrolling
